# ResourceContext

Brief description of what slice of app state this context owns, which features depend on it, and where it sits in the provider tree (see [App Providers](./overview.md)).

## State Shape

```ts
interface ResourceState {
  // Auto-populated from context.ts
}
```

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `fieldOne` | `string` | <!-- description --> |
| `fieldTwo` | `boolean` | <!-- description --> |

## Actions

| Action | Signature | Description |
|--------|-----------|-------------|
| `setFieldOne` | `(value: string) => void` | <!-- description --> |

## Usage

Access this context via its hook — never consume the context object directly.

```tsx
import { useResource } from '@/store/Resource/context';

function MyComponent() {
  const { fieldOne, setFieldOne } = useResource();
}
```

## Provider Setup

This context is mounted via `CombineProviders` in `app-providers.tsx`. No manual wrapping needed.

```tsx
// Already included in AppProvider
<ResourceProvider>
  {children}
</ResourceProvider>
```
